chain.title: Blockchain
chain.description: Which blockchain to write the attestation to. **Solana** is fastest (~$0.001, <1s), **Base** is best for compliance (~$0.02, 2-5s).

data.title: Data to Attest
data.description: The data you want to create an on-chain proof for. This will be hashed with SHA-256 (only the hash goes on-chain, not the full data).

sectionCaption_metadata.title: Metadata (Optional)
sectionCaption_metadata.sectionDescription: Add context about your attestation and configure how it's stored

actor_id.title: Actor ID
actor_id.description: The Apify Actor that produced this data (e.g., 'apify/google-search-scraper')

run_id.title: Run ID
run_id.description: The specific Actor run ID that produced this data

source_url.title: Source URL
source_url.description: The URL where this data was scraped from

description.title: Description
description.description: A human-readable description of what this attestation is for

custom_metadata.title: Custom Metadata
custom_metadata.description: Any additional custom fields you want to include (JSON object)

generate_verification_url.title: Generate Verification URL
generate_verification_url.description: Include a verification URL in the output for easy verification

store_full_data.title: Store Full Data in Apify
store_full_data.description: Store the complete data in Apify's Key-Value store (in addition to on-chain hash). Useful for later verification.

sectionCaption_verify.title: Verification Mode
sectionCaption_verify.sectionDescription: Use this to verify an existing attestation instead of creating a new one

verify_mode.title: Enable Verification Mode
verify_mode.description: Check this to verify an existing attestation instead of creating a new one

tx_hash.title: Transaction Hash
tx_hash.description: The blockchain transaction hash to verify (only needed when Verification Mode is enabled)
